description: Calculate the total water surface area (in acres) for the 'Maximum' water surface profile of the Muncie HEC-RAS model. Document the results in a text file at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/inundated_area_report.txt with the text: "Total Inundated Area: X acres" (where X is the calculated value). Additionally, export a CSV file to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/reach_data.csv containing the River_Station, Top_Width_ft, and Reach_Length_ft for each cross-section, and generate a plot showing Top Width (ft) vs River Station at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/top_width_profile.png.
